task.role: You are a Senior Desktop Engineer with expertise in Electron and native integrations. Implement Task 30 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Create Electron app with system tray integration and native desktop notifications
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 16, 28 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description:
1. Set up Electron 28+ project with React
2. Implement system tray with badge count
3. Add native desktop notification support
4. Create main window with notification feed
5. Set up auto-updater and cross-platform builds

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-30): Desktop Client Foundation (Spark - Electron)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
Electron app starts, system tray shows unread count, desktop notifications appear, main window displays notifications

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
